messages.content:
You are inspecting a company's careers source. Return strict JSON only.
Pick the best source type and describe listing/detail extraction hints.
Allowed source_type values: api, json, html, spa.
Use structural selectors or JSON paths only. No regex.
Try to identify selectors or paths for title, url/apply_url, location, date_posted_text, employment_type, work_type, salary_range, and job_description whenever the source exposes them.
Domain: zoho.com

evidence.title: Zoho Corporation | Careers
evidence.snippet:
Zoho.com
Jobs
Log in
 
Register
 
 
We’re more than just a workplace.
We’re a family.

We know that finding a meaningful and rewarding career can be a long journey. Our goal is to make that process easy for you and to create a work environment that's enriching—one that you'll look forward to every day.

VIEW OPEN ROLES
Some opportunities for you to explore
 
TECHNICAL SUPPORT ENGINEERS
Provide voice-based support to international/domestic customers over the phone (Inbound and Outbound). Build a rapport with customers with clear and c...
Full time
SALES EXECUTIVES
Build rapport with contacts and understand where the prospect is in the buying process. Identify opportunities that meet a minimum qualification crite...
Full time

Can’t find what you’re looking for?
Register on our Candidate Portal and get notified when new roles that match your skills open up.

REGISTER HERE
Terms of Service
Privacy Policy

© 2026, Zoho Corporation Pvt. Ltd. All Rights Reserved.

events.note: Detected source type api; jobs_found=True; job_count=1; recommended_strategy=beautifulsoup

messages.content:
Create a strict JSON scrape plan for a job scraper script.
The plan must support one of these strategies: api, json, html, spa.
Use the investigation payload as the source of truth. Do not infer new selectors or URLs unless the payload is empty.
Use structural extraction only. No regex. Missing fields should be null.
Return keys: strategy, entry_url, output_path, pagination, listing, detail, filters, notes.
Use JSON paths as arrays of keys/indices. Use CSS selectors for HTML extraction.
Context: {"domain": "zoho.com", "investigation": {"source_type": "api", "careers_url": "https://www.zoho.com/careers/", "platform": null, "api_url": "https://www.zohowebstatic.com/sites/zweb/js/translation/careers/4391.js", "jobs_found_during_investigation": true, "job_count_detected": 1, "job_titles": ["Get Started"], "listing_selector": "div[class~=\"zgh-accounts\"]", "job_selector": "div[class~=\"zgh-accounts\"]", "detail_selector": null, "recommended_strategy": "beautifulsoup", "json_paths": [], "selectors": {"listing": {"items_selector": "div[class~=\"zgh-accounts\"]", "title_selector": "a[class~=\"zgh-signup\"]", "url_selector": "a[class~=\"zgh-signup\"]", "location_selector": null, "description_selector": null, "date_posted_text_selector": null, "employment_type_selector": null, "work_type_selector": null, "salary_range_selector": null}, "detail": {"description_path": ["description"]}, "pagination": {"type": null, "page_param": null}}, "pagination": {}, "listing": {"items_selector": "div[class~=\"zgh-accounts\"]", "title_selector": "a[class~=\"zgh-signup\"]", "url_selector": "a[class~=\"zgh-signup\"]", "json_items_path": []}, "detail": {"url_path": ["url"], "description_path": ["description"]}}}

output.notes: Use the provided investigation payload as the source of truth. Strategy set to 'api' per investigation.api_url. Listing extraction uses the provided CSS selectors (items/title/url) from investigation.selectors.listing. Detail uses provided description_path. Do not infer selectors or URLs beyond the investigation payload. Missing fields are null.

plan.notes: Use the provided investigation payload as the source of truth. Strategy set to 'api' per investigation.api_url. Listing extraction uses the provided CSS selectors (items/title/url) from investigation.selectors.listing. Detail uses provided description_path. Do not infer selectors or URLs beyond the investigation payload. Missing fields are null.
